chapter_title.ar: باب فِي تَسْمِيَةِ مَنْ رَآهُ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – Regarding the naming of the ones who saw him<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/10)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/10)
text: هَا قَالَتْ كُنْتُ وَاقِفَةً مَعَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَى الصَّفَا فَجَاءَ ( عليه السلام ) حَتَّى وَقَفَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ قَبَضَ عَلَى كِتَابِ مَنَاسِكِهِ وَ حَدَّثَهُ بِأَشْيَاءَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Shazan Bin Nuaym, from Khadim Al Ibrahim Bin Abda Al Neyshapouri that she said,
‘I was staying with Ibrahim at Al-Safa, so he<sup>asws</sup> came until he<sup>asws</sup> paused by Ibrahim and grabbed the book of his rituals and discussed some things with him’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Shadhan ibn Nu‘aym from Ibrahim ibn ‘Abdahu al-Naysaburi’s house maid who has said the following. “I was standing with Ibrahim on al-Safa’ that he (the twelfth Imam) came and stood higher than Ibrahim, took his Hajj guide book and spoke to him about a number of things.”
